title: Top row mastery: Q W E R T
description: Drill left top row at speed — focus on accuracy
text: we wet were quit quiet rate water write quote query trade weather quest quartz tweet rest start great

tips.text: Same finger as A-S-D-F column but UP
Q is left pinky — uncommon but still needs speed

tips.target: we wet were quit quiet rate water write quote

tips.text: Return to home row between bursts

tips.target: query trade weather quest quartz tweet rest start great

character_tips.anna: Top row left. Stretch up, then HOME. Repeat.
character_tips.maxim: QWERT bottlenecks are common. Drill them flat now.
character_tips.knopych: TOP ROW LEFT! ⬆️ Reach high — and back home!
character_tips.klavochka: Up and down like waves, my dear 🌊
